card_summary: A newspaper clipping from The Commercial Appeal (Memphis, Tennessee), dated July 3, 2005, page 45. Likely contains an article, review, or feature related to Philip K. Dick, possibly in connection with a film adaptation or retrospective on his work.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from The Commercial Appeal (Memphis, Tennessee), dated Sunday, July 3, 2005, page 45. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 15, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This Memphis newspaper clipping from 2005 documents the national spread of Dick's cultural influence. By mid-2005, Dick's work was receiving widespread mainstream attention, with multiple film adaptations completed or in production and growing academic recognition. The Commercial Appeal's coverage demonstrates how Dick's reputation had penetrated beyond the coastal literary and science fiction centers into the broader American media landscape.
